Senior Full-Stack Engineer (React + Next.js)
Company: Boldare
Location: Remote (Poland/EU)
Type: B2B contract

About Boldare:
Boldare is a product design and development company working with scale-ups and enterprises. We build digital products from 0 to 1 and scale them. Current project: a SaaS e-commerce analytics platform for mid-market retailers, processing millions of events daily.

We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join a small, autonomous product team (5 engineers) building a Next.js-based analytics platform.

Requirements (must-have):
- 5+ years of JavaScript/TypeScript development
- 3+ years of React (hooks, context, performance optimization)
- Next.js (App Router, SSR, SSG, API routes)
- Node.js for backend API routes and scripts
- PostgreSQL or similar relational DB
- REST API design
- Jest and React Testing Library
- Git, CI/CD

Nice to have:
- NestJS for dedicated microservices
- Prisma or TypeORM
- GraphQL
- Redis
- Docker / Kubernetes
- Tailwind CSS
- Cypress or Playwright
- AWS or Vercel deployment
- E-commerce or analytics domain

What you will do:
- Build Next.js pages and React components for analytics dashboards with complex data visualizations
- Implement Node.js API routes and NestJS microservices for data aggregation
- Optimize SSR performance and Core Web Vitals for fast page loads
- Design PostgreSQL schemas and write efficient queries
- Write unit tests with Jest/RTL and E2E tests with Cypress
- Collaborate with product designer and backend engineers in weekly sprints

Tech stack:
Next.js 14, React 18, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Tailwind CSS, Jest, Cypress, Docker, Vercel

We offer:
- 26 000 – 34 000 PLN/month B2B
- 100% remote
- Small autonomous team, real ownership
- Modern stack, no legacy code
